name: Hum Rahe Na Rahe Hum
overview: Free-spirited Surilii lives a modest life while Shivendra is brought up in the strict traditions of Ranakgarh's royal family. Their worlds collide when the two fall madly in love with each other.

trailers.title: Hum Rahe Na Rahe Hum | New Show | Starts 10th April 2023
